title: Maximum Mold
description:
Maximum Mold is a specialized provider of tooling and machining solutions, focusing on the des
ign, engineering, and manufacturing of die cast dies, trim dies, and plastic injection molds.

Here is the access to upload company data. Employee personal information (passports, and other
docs), customer files, contracts and agreements, projects, NDAs, etc.
